name: python3-coreschema
title: python3-coreschema
summary: Python3 utilities to describe an abstract data schema to coreapi
description:
Python3 utilities to describe an abstract data schema to coreapi
Core API is a format-independent Document Object Model for representing Web
APIs.
.
This package provides an abstract Python library to describe classic data
types (Integers, Strings et al.).
.
This package provides the Python3 library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-coreschema because Python3 utilities to describe an abstract data schema to coreapi.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-coreschema as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-coreschema with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-coreschema --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
